forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Scattered Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: Scattered rain showers before 9pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 51. Southeast wind 2 to 7 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 9am and 5pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. East southeast wind 2 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Friday Night
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 47, with temperatures rising to around 51 overnight. East southeast wind 5 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 2pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 57. North wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
